name: Orange and Peanut Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
Maple or maple-flavored syrup can be used in place of honey.
1. Peel and slice sweet potato into 1/2-inch thick slices.
2. Place slices in a 10-ounce casserole dish, lightly sprinkled with salt.
3. Sprinkle with orange juice.
4. Micro-cook, covered, on 100% power for 4 to 6 minutes or till potatoes are tender. Let stand, covered.
5. For sauce, stir together orange juice, cornstarch, and shredded orange peel in a 1-cup measure.
6. Stir in honey or maple (or maple-flavored) syrup.
7. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 30 seconds to 1 minute or till thickened and bubbly, stirring every 15 seconds.
8. Stir sauce and potato slices together. Sprinkle with peanuts.
